object.name: PollOptionAdded
object.description: Describes a service message about an option added to a poll.
object.html_description: Describes a service message about an option added to a poll.
object.rst_description: Describes a service message about an option added to a poll.

annotations.description: Message containing the poll to which the option was added, if known. Note that the Message object in this field will not contain the reply_to_message field even if it itself is a reply.
annotations.html_description: Optional. Message containing the poll to which the option was added, if known. Note that the Message object in this field will not contain the reply_to_message field even if it itself is a reply.
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. Message containing the poll to which the option was added, if known. Note that the :class:`aiogram.types.message.Message` object in this field will not contain the *reply_to_message* field even if it itself is a reply.
annotations.name: poll_message

annotations.description: Unique identifier of the added option
annotations.rst_description: Unique identifier of the added option
annotations.name: option_persistent_id

annotations.description: Special entities that appear in the option_text
annotations.html_description: Optional. Special entities that appear in the option_text
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. Special entities that appear in the *option_text*
annotations.name: option_text_entities
